metadata.significance: Describes the overwhelming nature of the Day of Judgment and contrasts paradise with hell

ayahs.arabic: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ هَلْ أَتَىٰكَ حَدِيثُ ٱلْغَـٰشِيَةِ

translations.en_sahih: Has there reached you the report of the Overwhelming [event]?
translations.en_yusufali: Has the story reached thee of the overwhelming (Event)?
translations.ms_basmeih: Sudahkah sampai kepadamu (wahai Muhammad) perihal hari kiamat yang huru-haranya meliputi?

translations.en_sahih: [Some] faces, that Day, will be humbled,
translations.en_yusufali: Some faces, that Day, will be humiliated,
translations.ms_basmeih: Muka (orang-orang yang kafir) pada hari itu tunduk kerana merasa hina,

translations.en_sahih: Working [hard] and exhausted.
translations.en_yusufali: Labouring (hard), weary,-
translations.ms_basmeih: Mereka menjalankan kerja yang berat lagi berpenat lelah,

translations.en_sahih: They will [enter to] burn in an intensely hot Fire.
translations.en_yusufali: The while they enter the Blazing Fire,-
translations.ms_basmeih: Mereka tetap menderita bakaran neraka yang amat panas (membakar), -

translations.en_sahih: They will be given drink from a boiling spring.
translations.en_yusufali: The while they are given, to drink, of a boiling hot spring,
translations.ms_basmeih: Mereka diberi minum dari matair yang menggelegak panasnya.

ayahs.arabic: لَّيْسَ لَهُمْ طَعَامٌ إِلَّا مِن ضَرِيعٍ
ayahs.transliteration: Laysa lahum taAAamun illa min dareeAAin

translations.en_sahih: For them there will be no food except from a poisonous, thorny plant
translations.en_yusufali: No food will there be for them but a bitter Dhari'
translations.ms_basmeih: Tiada makanan bagi mereka (di situ) selain dari pokok-pokok yang berduri,

ayahs.arabic: لَّا يُسْمِنُ وَلَا يُغْنِى مِن جُوعٍ
ayahs.transliteration: La yusminu wala yughnee min jooAAin

translations.en_sahih: Which neither nourishes nor avails against hunger.
translations.en_yusufali: Which will neither nourish nor satisfy hunger.
translations.ms_basmeih: Yang tidak menggemokkan, dan tidak pula dapat menghilangkan sedikit kelaparan pun.

translations.en_sahih: [Other] faces, that Day, will show pleasure.
translations.en_yusufali: (Other) faces that Day will be joyful,
translations.ms_basmeih: (Sebaliknya) muka (orang-orang yang beriman) pada hari itu berseri-seri,

translations.en_sahih: With their effort [they are] satisfied
translations.en_yusufali: Pleased with their striving,-
translations.ms_basmeih: Berpuas hati dengan balasan amal usahanya (yang baik yang telah dikerjakannya di dunia), -

translations.en_sahih: In an elevated garden,
translations.en_yusufali: In a Garden on high,
translations.ms_basmeih: (Mereka tinggal menetap) di dalam Syurga tinggi (tempat kedudukannya darjatnya),

translations.en_sahih: Wherein they will hear no unsuitable speech.
translations.en_yusufali: Where they shall hear no (word) of vanity:
translations.ms_basmeih: Mereka tidak mendengar di situ sebarang perkataan yang sia-sia,

translations.en_sahih: Within it is a flowing spring.
translations.en_yusufali: Therein will be a bubbling spring:
translations.ms_basmeih: Di dalam Syurga itu ada matair yang mengalir,

translations.en_sahih: Within it are couches raised high
translations.en_yusufali: Therein will be Thrones (of dignity), raised on high,
translations.ms_basmeih: Di situ juga ada pelamin-pelamin (berhias) yang tinggi (tempatnya),

translations.en_sahih: And cups put in place
translations.en_yusufali: Goblets placed (ready),
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan piala-piala minuman yang disediakan (untuk mereka),

translations.en_sahih: And cushions lined up
translations.en_yusufali: And cushions set in rows,
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan bantal-bantal yang teratur (untuk mereka berbaring atau bersandar),

translations.en_sahih: And carpets spread around.
translations.en_yusufali: And rich carpets (all) spread out.
translations.ms_basmeih: Serta hamparan-hamparan yang terbentang.

ayahs.arabic: أَفَلَا يَنظُرُونَ إِلَى ٱلْإِبِلِ كَيْفَ خُلِقَتْ
ayahs.transliteration: Afala yanthuroona ila alibili kayfa khuliqat

translations.en_sahih: Then do they not look at the camels - how they are created?
translations.en_yusufali: Do they not look at the Camels, how they are made?-
translations.ms_basmeih: (Mengapa mereka yang kafir masih mengingkari akhirat) tidakkah mereka memperhatikan keadaan unta bagaimana ia diciptakan?

translations.en_sahih: And at the sky - how it is raised?
translations.en_yusufali: And at the Sky, how it is raised high?-
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan keadaan langit bagaimana ia ditinggikan binaannya.?

translations.en_sahih: And at the mountains - how they are erected?
translations.en_yusufali: And at the Mountains, how they are fixed firm?-
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan keadaan gunung-ganang bagaimana ia ditegakkan?

translations.en_sahih: And at the earth - how it is spread out?
translations.en_yusufali: And at the Earth, how it is spread out?
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan keadaan bumi bagaimana ia dihamparkan?

translations.en_sahih: So remind, [O Muhammad]; you are only a reminder.
translations.en_yusufali: Therefore do thou give admonition, for thou art one to admonish.
translations.ms_basmeih: Oleh itu berikanlah sahaja peringatan (wahai Muhammad, kepada manusia, dan janganlah berdukacita kiranya ada yang menolaknya), kerana sesungguhnya engkau hanyalah seorang Rasul pemberi ingatan;

translations.en_sahih: You are not over them a controller.
translations.en_yusufali: Thou art not one to manage (men's) affairs.
translations.ms_basmeih: Bukanlah engkau seorang yang berkuasa memaksa mereka (menerima ajaran Islam yang engkau sampaikan itu).

translations.en_sahih: However, he who turns away and disbelieves -
translations.en_yusufali: But if any turn away and reject Allah,-
translations.ms_basmeih: Akan tetapi sesiapa yang berpaling (dari kebenaran) serta ia kufur ingkar, -

translations.en_sahih: Then Allah will punish him with the greatest punishment.
translations.en_yusufali: Allah will punish him with a mighty Punishment,
translations.ms_basmeih: Maka Allah akan menyeksanya dengan azab seksa yang sebesar-besarnya.

translations.en_sahih: Indeed, to Us is their return.
translations.en_yusufali: For to Us will be their return;
translations.ms_basmeih: Sesungguhnya kepada Kamilah kembalinya mereka,

translations.en_sahih: Then indeed, upon Us is their account.
translations.en_yusufali: Then it will be for Us to call them to account.
translations.ms_basmeih: Selain dari itu, sesungguhnya tanggungan Kamilah soal menghitung amal mereka.
